scope: paraphrase_human acceptable-neighbor normalization for template-method-vs-strategy comparison phrasing
learner_facing_quality_improvement: The template-method-vs-strategy paraphrase now accepts the paired quick-check card when retrieval surfaces the same comparison in a shorter learning format, so the eval rewards learner-facing comparison help instead of over-penalizing a near-duplicate route.

verification.query_shape: 부모가 흐름 잡고 자식이 일부만 채우는 거랑, 외부가 행동을 골라 끼우는 거랑 어떻게 달라?

notes: The quick-check card already answers the same comparison axis with the same parent-controls-flow vs caller-chooses-strategy split.
The one-sided template-method primer was intentionally not promoted to acceptable because it explains only half of the learner's comparison question.
